case_title: FAUSTO HOSOLLOS et al VS. OSMAR BLANDON CALDERON et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOSOLLOS, FAUSTO HOSOLLOS, LILIAN MELGAR AS TO DEFENDANT CALDERON, OSMAR BLANDON DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-01-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-28-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-14-2012

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-18-2012 CONTINUED TO DEC-18-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-18-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-19-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-18-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-19-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-18-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-01-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-17-2013 CONTINUED TO MAR-18-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-17-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
